verses.text: Israel-te sungah kumpi a omloh hun laitakin, Levi mite khat Efraim mualtung gam mongah peemin, Judah gam Bethlehem panin zineu khat a la hi
A zineu ama tungah heh a, ama kiang panin paikhia-in Judah gam Bethlehem khua-a a pa' inn-ah ciah a, tua lai-ah kha li sung khawng a om hi

Tua ciangin a pasal dingkhia-in kam neem tawh a hopih ding leh a ciahpih kik dingin tuanu' nungah a pai hi. Amah in a nasempa leh a la nih tonpih hi. A sungpa' inn-ah tung a, a sungpa in amah a muh ciangin lungdamna tawh a dawn dingin hong pai hi
Tua ciangin a sungpa in amah taamsak a, amah tawh ni thum sung a om hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in an ne, tui dawnin giakkhawm uh hi

Tua ciangin a ni li ni zingsangin amaute tho baih uh a, pai dingin kithawi uh hi. Ahih hangin a sungpa in a makpa kiangah, “An tawmkhat ne-in na tha khauhsak in. Tua khit ciangin na pai thei ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin tua mi nihte tukhawmin an ne-in tui dawn uh hi. A sungpa in a makpa kiangah, “Tuzan taam ding lungkim hoh in la, na lung nuamsak in,” a ci hi
A pai dingin mipa a din' ciangin a sungpa in a taamkik dong mateng kho hi
Tua ciangin a ni nga ni-in a ding dingin zingsangin amah tho baih hi. A sungpa in, “An ne phot in la, ni a dialh mateng khawl lai in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in an ne uh hi

Mipa leh a zineu leh a nasempa a paikhia dingin a din' uh ciangin a sungpa in, “En in, tu-in nitak nai-in ni niamta hi; tuzan taam un. En in, ni tum dektak hi. Hih lai-ah giak in la, na lung nuamsak in. Zing ciang zingsangin tho baihin inn-ah na ciah ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin mipa tua zan taam nawnlo hi. Amah dingin paikhia a, Jebus (Jerusalem a cihna) galkhat tung hi. Amah pen tuan'na a kivawh la nih leh a zineu tawh ahi hi
Amaute Jebus kiang nai a tun' uh ciangin ni niam khin a, a nasempa in a topa kiangah, “Hih Jebus mite' khuapi-ah zan taam ni,” a ci hi
A topa in, “Israel mite a hilo, gamdang mite' khuapi sungah i taam kei ding hi. Gibeah-ah i paisuak ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in a nasempa kiangah, “Hong pai in, hih munte khat peuhpeuh va naihin, Gibeah ahih kei leh Ramah-ah zan taam ni,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in khengin paisuak uh a, Benjamin-te' gam ahi Gibeah khua gei-ah ni tum a
Gibeah-ah pai-in a giak dingin tua khua a zuan uh hi. Amah pai-in khuapisung kongzing laizangah tu hi; bang hang hiam cih leh a zan taam dingin kuamah in a inn-ah amaute sanglo hi
Tua laitakin puteek khat lo-a a nasepna panin nitak ciangin hong ciah hi. Tuapa pen Efraim mualtung gam pan hi a, amah Gibeah khua-ah a peem hi a, tua khuamite pen Benjamin mite ahi hi
Amah khuadak a, khualzinpa, khuapi kongzingah a mu hi. Tua ciangin puteekpa in, “Koi-ah pai ding na hi hiam? Koi panin hong pai na hi hiam?” a ci hi

Amah in, “Keima hong paikhiatna Judah gam Bethlehem khua panin Efraim mualtung gam mongah a pai dingin hong nawk ka hi uh hi. Judah gam Bethlehem-ah ka pai hi. Tu-in ka inn-a a ciah ka hi hi. Kuamah in a inn-ah hong tungsak nuamlo hi
Ka late uh-a' dingin buhtu leh gan-an, kei leh na nasemnu leh na nasemte tawh a om tangvalpa-a' dingin anlum leh leenggahzu ka nei uh a, a kisam bangmah omlo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin puteekpa in, “Lunghimawh kei in. Na kisapna khempeuh ka en ding hi. Kongzingah giak kei hamtang in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah in a inn-ah ciahpihin late gan-an a pia hi. Amaute in a khe uh silin an a ne uh hi

Amaute in a lung uh nuamsakin a om laitakun, tua khuapi mi, mi ginalote in tua inn kimkotah pangin a kongkhak tumgawp uh hi. Amaute in inn nei puteekpa kiangah, “Ama taw ka luk theihna dingun na inn-ah a hong tung mipa hong paikhiatpih in,” a ci uh hi
Inn neipa, amaute kiangah pusuakin amaute tungah, “Hilo hi, ka sanggamte aw; tua bangin gitloh gamtat kei un

En un, hih lai-ah ka ta nungak leh ka zinpa' zineu om hi. Amaute hong paikhiatpih ning. Amaute buanin hoih na sak bangun amaute tungah hih un. Ahih hangin hih mipa tungah tua bang a sia gamta kei un,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin mite in ama thu ngailo uh hi. Tua ciangin Levi mipa in a zineu manin amaute kiangah koihkhia hi. Amaute in tuanu buan uh a, zingsang mateng zan tawntung tuanu hih uh hi. Zingsang khuavak dingin a kipat ciangin amaute in tuanu ciahsak uh hi
Zingsang khua hong vak ciangin a numei hong ciahin, ama topa a omna mipa' kongkhakah pukin khuavak dong om hi
Zingsang ciangin a topa tho a, a khualzin zom dingin inn kongkhak hongin a paikhiat ciangin, inn kongkhakah a zineu lumin sangkil tungah a khutte a kinga a mu hi
Amah in a zineu kiangah, “Tho in, pai ta ni,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in dawng nawnlo hi. Tua ciangin amah in domto-in a la tungah tuanu koih a, a inn-ah a ciahpih hi
A inn-ah a tun' ciangin amah in tem khat la a, a zineu lenin a phei a liangin seh sawmlenih suahin sem a, Israel-te' gamsung khempeuhah a hawm hi
A mu mite khempeuh in, “Egypt gam panin Israel mite a paikhiata kipan tuni dongin hih bang thu piang ngeilo a, zong kimu ngeilo hi. Hih thu ngaihsun un; kikum un la, gen un,” a ci uh hi.
